# services.beszel

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.beszel`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.beszel.agent.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable beszel agent. |
| `services.beszel.agent.environment` | `open submodule of attribute set of string` | Environment variables for configuring the beszel-agent service. This field will end up public in /nix/store, for secret values (such as `KEY`) use `environmentFile`. See <https://www.beszel.dev/guide/environment-variables#agent> for available options. |
| `services.beszel.agent.environment.SKIP_SYSTEMD` | `boolean` | Whether to disable systemd service monitoring. Enabling this option will skip systemd tracking and its setup in NixOS. |
| `services.beszel.agent.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | File path containing environment variables for configuring the beszel-agent service in the format of an EnvironmentFile. See {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)`. |
| `services.beszel.agent.extraPath` | `list of package` | Extra packages to add to beszel path (such as nvidia-smi or rocm-smi). |
| `services.beszel.agent.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall port (default 45876). |
| `services.beszel.agent.package` | `package` | The beszel package to use. |
| `services.beszel.agent.smartmon.deviceAllow` | `list of string` | List of device paths to allow access to for SMART monitoring. This is only needed if the ambient capabilities are not sufficient. Devices will be granted read-only access. |
| `services.beszel.agent.smartmon.enable` | `boolean` | Include services.beszel.agent.smartmon.package in the Beszel agent path for disk monitoring and add the agent to the disk group. |
| `services.beszel.agent.smartmon.package` | `package` | The smartmontools package to use. |
| `services.beszel.hub.dataDir` | `absolute path` | Data directory of beszel-hub. |
| `services.beszel.hub.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable beszel hub. |
| `services.beszel.hub.environment` | `attribute set of string` | Environment variables passed to the systemd service. See <https://www.beszel.dev/guide/environment-variables#hub> for available options. |
| `services.beszel.hub.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Environment file to be passed to the systemd service. Useful for passing secrets to the service to prevent them from being world-readable in the Nix store. See {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)`. |
| `services.beszel.hub.host` | `string` | Host or address this beszel hub listens on. |
| `services.beszel.hub.package` | `package` | The beszel package to use. |
| `services.beszel.hub.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port for this beszel hub to listen on. |
